title: Kiwi Boi
description: Adds kiwi birds to the game!
body:
![Kiwi Boi logo](https://imgur.com/nlBc41o.png)

Kiwi Boi
---
**Kiwi Boi** adds kiwi birds to the game. They dance to music, and can be bred with a new food item: Kiwicake!

These birds can be found throughout the Taiga.

There is also a new painting to go along with these birds.

---
